description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, deploy, release, and publish_external using the node:14.15.4 Docker image globally and ruby:latest for the Heroku deploy jobs. In the test stage define test_lints_js (npm install then npm run test:js), test_lints_pug (npm install then npm run test:pug), test_lints_sass (npm install then npm run test:sass), and test_units (npm install, npm run build:vendors, npx gulp generateZip, apt-get update, apt-get install a long list of system libraries, then npm run test:e2eCI). In the build stage add build_fe (npm install; npm run postinstall; npm run build:css; npm run build:js) and build_vendors (npm install gulp; npm run build:vendors). In the deploy stage add deploy_next_release, deploy_staging, and deploy_production, each limited to the master branch, using ruby:latest, running apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku with the respective $HEROKU_DEVELOPMENT_NAME, $HEROKU_STAGING_NAME, or $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_NAME and $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY; deploy_production is manual. Add a manual version_release job on the release stage that runs npm install and npx semantic-release only on master, and a release:eos-ds-npm job on the publish_external stage that needs version_release, runs only on master, and triggers the SUSE-UIUX/eos-ds-npm project with strategy depend.
